label: Webcam — photo or video (pick mode)
description: One step that takes a still ('photo') or records a clip ('video') from a local webcam. Leave camera_name blank to auto-pick.

label: Webcam photo (auto-detect camera)
description: Grabs a single still from the first detected webcam and attaches it to the report.

label: Webcam video — record 10s
description: Records a short webcam clip and attaches the video to the report.

label: Desktop screenshot (this PC)
description: Captures the Maestro machine's desktop as a PNG and attaches it.

label: Detect cameras on this PC
description: Lists the cameras Windows reports on this machine.

label: List capture devices (ffmpeg)
description: Lists DirectShow capture devices via ffmpeg (cameras + audio).
